field.label: Enable Nebula
field.help: Run the Nebula daemon and start it at boot.

field.label: Listen Port
field.help: UDP port Nebula listens on. Default 4242; use 0 for an OS-assigned port (clients only).

field.label: Act as Lighthouse
field.help: Enable only if this node is a lighthouse (does host discovery and NAT punching for the mesh). Leave off for a normal node.

field.label: Lighthouse Hosts
field.help: Overlay (Nebula) IPs of the lighthouses this node uses, one per line. Leave empty on a lighthouse.

field.label: Static Host Map
field.help: Maps a lighthouse overlay IP to its public underlay address(es), one per line: "192.168.100.1 = 198.51.100.1:4242".

field.label: CA Certificate
field.help: PEM of the trusted Nebula CA certificate(s) — written to ca.crt.

field.label: Host Certificate
field.help: PEM of this node's host certificate — written to host.crt.

field.label: Host Key
field.help: PEM of this node's host private key — written to host.key (mode 0600).
